001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.entity;
002
003import androidx.room.ColumnInfo;
004import androidx.room.Entity;
005import androidx.room.ForeignKey;
006import androidx.room.Index;
007import androidx.room.PrimaryKey;
008
009@Entity(
010    tableName = "palette_color",
011    indices = {
012        @Index(value = "palette_id"),
013        @Index(value = {"palette_id", "color_order"}, unique = true)
014    },
015    foreignKeys = {
016        @ForeignKey(
017            entity = Palette.class,
018            parentColumns = "palette_id",
019            childColumns = "palette_id",
020            onDelete = ForeignKey.CASCADE
021        )
022    }
023)
024public class PaletteColor {
025
026  @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true)
027  @ColumnInfo(name = "palette_color_id")
028  private long id;
029
030  @ColumnInfo(name = "palette_id")
031  private long paletteId;
032
033  @ColumnInfo(name = "color_value")
034  private int colorValue;
035
036  @ColumnInfo(name = "color_order")
037  private int colorOrder;
038
039  @ColumnInfo(name = "color_name")
040  private String colorName;
041
042  public long getId() {
043    return id;
044  }
045
046  public void setId(long id) {
047    this.id = id;
048  }
049
050  public long getPaletteId() {
051    return paletteId;
052  }
053
054  public void setPaletteId(long paletteId) {
055    this.paletteId = paletteId;
056  }
057
058  public int getColorValue() {
059    return colorValue;
060  }
061
062  public void setColorValue(int colorValue) {
063    this.colorValue = colorValue;
064  }
065
066  public int getColorOrder() {
067    return colorOrder;
068  }
069
070  public void setColorOrder(int colorOrder) {
071    this.colorOrder = colorOrder;
072  }
073
074  public String getColorName() {
075    return colorName;
076  }
077
078  public void setColorName(String colorName) {
079    this.colorName = colorName;
080  }
081}
